statement: In every magma, Equation 3831 (`x * y = (z * z) * (w * x)`) implies Equation 3869 (`x * x = (x * (y * x)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0066
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z z) (op w x))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op (op x (op y x)) z)
